---
layout: post
title: "Statistics for Museum loan requests"
---

Public users use an [online web UI](https://dina-web.net/loan) to request loans from the Swedish Museum of Natural History. Here is an example report showing the number of [loan requests made during 2015](/loan-requests/) (note: the numbers are not up to date, this post is an example showing a static report making use of leaflet for displaying a map, for up to date statse, see the earlier URL).
